title: taraxacum aesculosum
intro: Taraxacum aesculosum is a species of flowering plant that is a variant of the dandelion and is closely related to the common dandelion (Taraxacum officinale), but it is not as widely known or studied. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum aesculosum include its potential to act as a diuretic, to reduce inflammation, and to support the health of the liver and kidneys. The health benefits of this plant are thought to include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Taraxacum aesculosum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, but it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using it as a treatment for any health condition.
